paper.title: Tessera Therapeutics Presents New Preclinical Data in In Vivo AATD and SCD Programs at ESGCT 2024

formulations.formulation_notes: ESGCT October 2024 is chronologically BEFORE ASH 2024 (December). First disclosure of 52% HBB number.

experiments.figure_source: Press release text / ESGCT oral presentation
experiments.notes: 52% HBB rewriting in LT-HSCs, single dose, humanized mice. 'Carrier level efficiency' — meaning matching the editing level expected in sickle cell carriers who are asymptomatic. Holmes CSO presented this as oral talk at ESGCT. NOTE: This '52% HBB editing' is NOT the same as ASH 2024's '52x BM fold-change' — completely different experiments (editing % vs GFP reporter fold-change), coincidental number. HBB editing subsequently improved to 62% by ASH Dec 2024 via cargo optimization (Gene Writer improvement, not LNP reformulation).
>70% B2M rewriting in NHP using surrogate reagent. Consistent with 76% B2M reported at ASH 2024.

results.hsc_definition: LT-HSCs confirmed by secondary transplant engraftment

experiments.notes: CRITICAL: Secondary transplant confirms TRUE LT-HSC editing (not just progenitor). Edited HSCs maintained engraftment levels in secondary recipients. This is the gold-standard assay for confirming HSC self-renewal capacity after editing.

key_findings_for_project: 52% HBB editing in humanized mouse LT-HSCs — single dose, 'carrier level efficiency' (improved to 62% by ASH Dec 2024 via cargo optimization)
>70% B2M in NHP (surrogate, consistent with 76% at ASH 2024)
SECONDARY TRANSPLANT CONFIRMS TRUE LT-HSC EDITING — gold standard functional assay
Edited HSCs maintained engraftment in secondary recipients — confirms self-renewal preserved
Chronologically first Tessera presentation of 52% HBB number (before ASH 2024's 30%+ number)
CRITICAL DISAMBIGUATION: ESGCT '52% HBB editing' ≠ ASH 2024 '52x BM fold-change' — completely different experiments, coincidental number
HBB editing improved: 52% (ESGCT Oct 2024) → 62% (ASH Dec 2024) in humanized mice, via cargo optimization not LNP reformulation

comparison_to_existing_data.vs_breda: Massively outperforms. Breda did not perform secondary transplant after in vivo LNP editing.
comparison_to_existing_data.vs_shi: Outperforms. Shi did not report functional HSC assays.
comparison_to_existing_data.vs_kim: Kim did not perform therapeutic editing.
comparison_to_existing_data.new_pareto_points: 52% HBB is highest single-dose humanized mouse number. No liver data for Pareto.
comparison_to_existing_data.therapeutic_window_update: 52% exceeds carrier level (40-50% Hb S). Secondary transplant confirms durability at stem cell level.

limitations_and_caveats: 52% HBB (ESGCT) vs >30% Makassar (ASH 2024) — different targets and experiments; 52% HBB ≠ 52x BM fold-change
Secondary transplant details sparse (editing level in secondary recipients not quantified in press release)
